claims: AC8.1: postinstall installs the Node runtime under ~/.claude/ralph-desk and removes the legacy zsh runtime files, while uninstall removes the installed Node runtime tree
AC8.2: the Node CLI entry point parses the documented /rlp-desk run flags and launches the campaign with the expected configuration
AC8.3: node src/node/run.mjs --help shows the current CLI command surface and all documented run flags with no missing options
AC8.4: unsupported or malformed Node versions fall back gracefully during postinstall without corrupting an existing zsh installation

execution_steps.summary: Wrote tests/node/us008-cli-entrypoint.test.mjs with 12 node:test cases covering happy, boundary, and negative coverage for AC8.1 through AC8.4.
RED: the suite failed because src/node/run.mjs did not exist, postinstall still installed legacy zsh runtime files, and unsupported-node fallback behavior was missing.

Implemented src/node/run.mjs, rewrote scripts/postinstall.js and scripts/uninstall.js for Node-runtime installation/removal, narrowed package.json publish files to Node sources, and updated the test-spec traceability for US-008.
GREEN: 12/12 US-008 tests passed, covering install/uninstall behavior, CLI parsing, help output, and unsupported-node fallback.

execution_steps.command: node -e "await import('./src/node/shared/paths.mjs'); await import('./src/node/shared/fs.mjs'); await import('./src/node/tmux/pane-manager.mjs'); await import('./src/node/cli/command-builder.mjs'); await import('./src/node/polling/signal-poller.mjs'); await import('./src/node/prompts/prompt-assembler.mjs'); await import('./src/node/init/campaign-initializer.mjs'); await import('./src/node/runner/campaign-main-loop.mjs'); await import('./src/node/reporting/campaign-reporting.mjs'); await import('./src/node/run.mjs');"
execution_steps.summary: Import smoke passed for the full Node runtime including the new CLI entry point.
CLI help smoke passed and printed the full command surface plus all documented run flags, including --autonomous and --with-self-verification.

execution_steps.command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && home="$tmpdir/home" && proj="$tmpdir/proj" && mkdir -p "$home" "$proj" && pack_json=$(npm pack --json) && tarball=$(node -e "const data = JSON.parse(process.argv[1]); process.stdout.write(data[0].filename);" "$pack_json") && tar -tf "$tarball" > "$tmpdir/tar.txt" && if grep -E 'package/src/scripts/|package/src/scripts/(init_ralph_desk|run_ralph_desk|lib_ralph_desk)\.zsh' "$tmpdir/tar.txt" >/dev/null; then echo 'tarball contains legacy zsh runtime' >&2; exit 1; fi && HOME="$home" npm install --prefix "$proj" "$PWD/$tarball" >/dev/null 2>&1 && test -f "$home/.claude/ralph-desk/node/run.mjs" && test ! -e "$home/.claude/ralph-desk/run_ralph_desk.zsh" && node "$home/.claude/ralph-desk/node/run.mjs" --help | grep -- '--autonomous'
execution_steps.summary: Real npm pack/install cycle passed: the tarball contained only the Node runtime sources, postinstall created ~/.claude/ralph-desk/node/run.mjs, no legacy zsh runtime file was installed, and the installed CLI help worked.

execution_steps.command: git commit -m "iter-009 US-008 node cli entry point"
execution_steps.summary: Committed the US-008 implementation and evidence artifacts.
